# Code of Conduct

## Be Respectful

Treat everyone with respect and professionalism.

## Be Constructive

Provide actionable feedback and criticism.

## Be Inclusive

We welcome contributors of all experience levels and backgrounds.

## Unacceptable Behavior

- Harassment
- Hate speech
- Personal attacks
- Trolling
- Publishing private information

## Enforcement

Maintainers may remove content or restrict participation when necessary to maintain a healthy community.

## Scope

Applies to:

- Issues
- Discussions
- Pull Requests
- Community interactions related to the project
